global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on food delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a special offer.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller black text below the headline reads 'Fresh favorites nearby', providing additional context.

elements.label: Two mirrors icon
elements.description: A simple, outlined icon resembling two mirrors is centered in the ad, suggesting a reflection or choice.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another decorative element is present, possibly representing food or delivery, but lacks specific detail.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward' in bold, inviting users to take action.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is displayed in a bold, eye-catching format, drawing attention to the offer.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' is positioned at the top left, featuring a modern font that represents the brand.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, indicating a promotional offer.
